title: ActionableRecallResponse
description: Wire shape returned by local_recall when NTCLI_FF_ACTIONABLE=1.

matches.description: Original recall items in rank order.

next_action.description: Empty string when top match type is not in {decision, bugfix, pattern} or matches is empty.

checklist.description: Up to 5 items extracted from the top match's bullet lines.

inferred_paths.description: Unique file paths mentioned in the top 3 matches' content, first-seen order.
